rules.rule: Controller class names must be plural to match the REST resource (e.g., StudentsController, not StudentController).
HTTP verbs must map to service operations: POSTâ†’Add, GETâ†’Retrieve, PUTâ†’Modify, DELETEâ†’Remove.
Actions must return correct HTTP status codes: POSTâ†’201 Created, GETâ†’200/404, PUTâ†’200, DELETEâ†’200, validation failureâ†’400, unexpected errorâ†’500.
Controllers must catch service-layer exceptions and map them to the correct IActionResult.
Controllers must depend only on service-layer interfaces; broker injection is forbidden.
Controller action bodies must be thin: one service call plus exception mapping only.
